name: Skibidi Hit Master
description: Skibidi Hit Master is a hilarious Shooting game where you must defend the world from an invasion of Skibidi Toilets! Take on the role of a cameraman and fight off waves of toilet-like monsters. Battle the Skibidi Boss, G-Man, and his army of quirky enemies. Embark on this absurd comedy and save humanity from the comical toilet terror! Get ready to laugh through the flush in this entertaining adventure with cartoonish graphics.
